examples: She soon knew them, too, for she had listened attentively.
A squirrel was perched on Dickon's bent back attentively nibbling a nut.
Heidi had listened attentively, and said now with sparkling eyes, "If I could only read already!"
Mr Murdoch, who has denied the charges, watched attentively from behind the security glass panels.
They attentively heard national and international specialists that mentioned all aspects of the theme.
